---
title: "example report with FNL theme"
author: 
  - name: "Firstname Lastname, ABC"
    affiliation: 
      - Bioinformatics Software Engineer
      - CCR Collaborative Bioinformatics Resource
date: today
date-format: MMM DD, YYYY
format:
    fnl-html:
        code-link: true
        code-fold: true
---

refer to the Quarto guide for details on writing documents with Quarto: 
<https://quarto.org/>

## example plot

```{r example-plot}
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
plot_cars <- mtcars |>
  ggplot(aes(mpg, cyl)) +
  geom_point()
ggplotly(plot_cars)
```
